movie.synopsis: Chota Bhem and Little Singham The Rise of Betal (2026) Little Singham and Chhota Bhim head to Ujjain for Raja Vikramaditya’s birthday celebration. Trouble strikes as Kaal and Kirmada attack to grab Kaaya Mani and revive spooky Hamunaptra. When Chandkaal returns, Vetaal joins the heroes for fearless showdown.
